rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks only for the current component's scope, using its declared subcomponents, ports, and connections as valid identifiers.
Use assume/guarantee clauses to express behavioral contracts derived from signal flow and deployment bindings, not implementation details.
generic_rules: Map structural relationships (e.g., signal routes, deployment bindings) to logical conditions using visible component and port identifiers.
Prefer named assumptions and guarantees over assignments unless explicitly modeling implementation-level bindings within an implementation annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Enclose AGREE contracts in annex agree {** ... **}; with proper semicolon termination per clause.
Use exact case-sensitive names from the AADL model; no invented or example-based identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless they are explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
Do not generate assign statements for signal routing unless the model context explicitly permits implementation-level bindings in this annex scope.
